hooks.command: bash -c 'NAME=$(jq -r .name <<< "$(cat)"); CWD=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel); DIR="$CWD/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; git fetch origin main >&2 && git worktree add -b "chenyn/$NAME" "$DIR" origin/main >&2 && echo "$DIR"'
bash -c 'WTP=$(jq -r .worktree_path <<< "$(cat)"); git worktree remove "$WTP" 2>/dev/null || git worktree remove --force "$WTP"'
